title: senecio chillanensis
intro: Senecio chillanensis, also known as Chillán groundsel or Chillán ragwort, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to Chile. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Senecio chillanensis is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
